description: The Varacalli are a 'ndrina (organized crime clan) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Ciminà, Calabria, Italy. They operate in the Locride area and also in Turin, where they are involved in drug trafficking. The clan was involved in the Ciminà feud from 1966, which caused about 50 deaths and extended to Turin. Some members have become pentiti (collaborators with justice).
